ast.target: 转换音频文件之前，请设置默认的转录提供商和模型。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 用于 AI 操作的云端模型

ast.name: text
ast.target: Perplexity 无法使用 Nexus 工具

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter a title for your new conversation:
ast.target: 为您的新对话输入标题：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your AI assistant for exploring and managing your vault.
ast.target: 您的 AI 助手，用于探索和管理您的知识库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure a provider to start chatting.
ast.target: 配置一个提供商以开始聊天。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Chat service unavailable. Please reload Obsidian.
ast.target: 聊天服务不可用。请重新加载 Obsidian。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This launches your local CLI in print mode, restricts built-in tools, and exposes only the local server for this vault.
ast.target: 这将以打印模式启动您的本地 CLI，限制内置工具，并仅为此知识库公开本地服务器。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Drag cards to change status. Use the edit icon for task details.
ast.target: 拖动卡片以更改状态。使用编辑图标查看任务详情。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Nexus is an AI-powered assistant that lives inside your Obsidian vault. It can read and write your notes, search through your content, and maintain long-term memory of your conversations—all while keeping your data local and private.
ast.target: Nexus 是一个 AI 驱动的助手，内置于您的 Obsidian 知识库中。它可以读写您的笔记、搜索内容，并在对话中保持长期记忆——同时确保您的数据本地存储且私密。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Read, create, and edit notes in your vault
ast.target: 在您的知识库中读取、创建和编辑笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Search content by keywords or semantic meaning
ast.target: 按关键词或语义搜索内容

ast.name: text
ast.source: Remember context across conversations with workspaces
ast.target: 通过工作区在对话间记住上下文

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run custom prompts and spawn sub-agents
ast.target: 运行自定义提示并生成子代理

ast.name: text
ast.source: Work fully offline with local LLMs (Ollama, LM Studio)
ast.target: 使用本地 LLM（Ollama、LM Studio）完全离线工作

ast.name: text
ast.source: Nexus works in two ways—pick one or use both:
ast.target: Nexus 有两种工作方式——选择一种或两者兼用：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use Nexus as an AI chat assistant directly in Obsidian.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 中直接将 Nexus 用作 AI 聊天助手。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 第一步：配置一个 LLM 提供商

ast.name: text
ast.source: You need at least one LLM provider configured to use the chat.
ast.target: 您需要至少配置一个 LLM 提供商才能使用聊天功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Once a provider is configured, you can open the chat view:
ast.target: 配置提供商后，您可以打开聊天视图：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click the chat icon in the left ribbon
ast.target: 点击左侧功能区中的聊天图标

ast.name: text
ast.source: Or use the command palette: "Nexus: open chat"
ast.target: 或使用命令面板：“Nexus：打开聊天”

ast.name: text
ast.source: Or use the hotkey: Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + C
ast.target: 或使用快捷键：Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + C

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your AI assistant has full access to your vault. Ask questions, take notes, and get help with your writing.
ast.target: 您的 AI 助手可以完全访问您的知识库。提问、记笔记，并获得写作帮助。

ast.name: text
ast.source: MCP integration requires a desktop environment.
ast.target: MCP 集成需要桌面环境。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Node.js is required to run the MCP connector. Install it, then click refresh.
ast.target: 运行 MCP 连接器需要 Node.js。请安装它，然后点击刷新。

ast.name: text
ast.source: MCP setup is only available on desktop.
ast.target: MCP 设置仅在桌面端可用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Install Claude Desktop, open it once, then enable settings → developer → MCP servers
ast.target: 安装 Claude Desktop，打开一次，然后启用设置 → 开发者 → MCP 服务器

ast.name: text
ast.source: Restart Claude Desktop if you haven't already.
ast.target: 如果尚未操作，请重启 Claude Desktop。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ config file is invalid or empty

ast.name: text
ast.source: The config file exists but has invalid JSON. Click "fix config" to overwrite it, or manually edit.
ast.target: 配置文件存在但包含无效的JSON。点击“修复配置”以覆盖它，或手动编辑。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Restart codex or start a new session if Nexus does not appear.
ast.target: 如果Nexus未出现，请重启Codex或启动新会话。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This updates the config file directly; no terminal window opens.
ast.target: 这将直接更新配置文件；不会打开终端窗口。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If auto-configuration doesn't work, copy this JSON into your Claude Desktop config:
ast.target: 如果自动配置不起作用，请将此JSON复制到您的Claude Desktop配置中：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This wipes the local cache and rebuilds it from the synced event store. Your conversations, workspaces, and tasks are not deleted — they live in the synced files which are not touched.
ast.target: 这将清除本地缓存并从同步的事件存储中重建。您的对话、工作区和任务不会被删除——它们存在于未被触及的同步文件中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The plugin will be unresponsive while the rebuild runs. This usually takes a few seconds.
ast.target: 在重建运行期间，插件将无响应。这通常需要几秒钟。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These settings are used when starting a new chat.
ast.target: 这些设置在开始新聊天时使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Scheduling is off. This workflow can still be run manually.
ast.target: 调度已关闭。此工作流仍可手动运行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Organize your vault into focused workspaces
ast.target: 将您的保险库组织成专注的工作区

ast.name: text
ast.target: 工作区服务正在初始化...

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tasks yet. Add one to get started.
ast.target: 暂无任务。添加一个以开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save this workspace before managing states.
ast.target: 在管理状态之前，请保存此工作区。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Snapshots of workspace context that can be resumed later. Edit, archive, or delete states here.
ast.target: 工作区上下文的快照，可稍后恢复。在此编辑、归档或删除状态。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save this workspace before managing projects and tasks.
ast.target: 在管理项目和任务之前，请保存此工作区。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manage workspace projects and project tasks using the same settings navigation pattern as workflows.
ast.target: 使用与工作流相同的设置导航模式管理工作区项目和项目任务。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No projects yet. Create one to get started.
ast.target: 暂无项目。创建一个以开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tasks blocked by this one.
ast.target: 没有被此任务阻塞的任务。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create specialized prompts with custom system instructions
ast.target: 使用自定义系统指令创建专门的提示

ast.name: text
ast.source: A brief description of what this prompt does
ast.target: 此提示功能的简要描述

ast.name: text
ast.source: Instructions that define this prompt's behavior and expertise
ast.target: 定义此提示行为和专业知识的指令

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run AI locally on your device. Works offline, completely private, no API costs.
ast.target: 在您的设备上本地运行AI。离线工作，完全私密，无API成本。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Limited GPU memory - smaller models only
ast.target: GPU内存有限 - 仅支持较小的模型

ast.name: text
ast.source: Common models: llama3.1, mistral, codellama, phi3, gemma
ast.target: 常用模型：llama3.1, mistral, codellama, phi3, gemma

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter the exact model name above
ast.target: 在上方输入确切的模型名称

ast.name: text
ast.source: No models discovered yet. Click "discover models" to scan the server.
ast.target: 尚未发现模型。点击“发现模型”以扫描服务器。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open LM Studio and load your desired model(s)
ast.target: 打开LM Studio并加载您想要的模型

ast.name: text
ast.source: Start the local server (usually on port 1234)
ast.target: 启动本地服务器（通常在端口1234上）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click "discover models" to fetch available models
ast.target: 点击“发现模型”以获取可用模型

ast.name: text
ast.source: The first discovered model will be used by default
ast.target: 第一个发现的模型将默认使用

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在 github.com/login/device 输入此代码：

ast.name: text
ast.source: On mobile, only fetch-based providers are supported. Configure local providers and SDK-based providers on desktop.
ast.target: 在移动设备上，仅支持基于fetch的提供商。请在桌面上配置本地提供商和基于SDK的提供商。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Skills are reusable playbooks discovered from provider folders and mirrored into your vault. Create, edit, archive, or delete them here.
ast.target: 技能是从提供商文件夹中发现并镜像到您的保险库中的可重用操作手册。在此创建、编辑、归档或删除它们。

ast.name: text
ast.source: App manager not available. Please restart the plugin.
ast.target: 应用管理器不可用。请重启插件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No apps available yet. Apps will appear here as they are added.
ast.target: 暂无可用应用。应用将在添加后显示在此处。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manage your conversation data, exports, and backups.
ast.target: 管理您的对话数据、导出和备份。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Conversation and workspace event data live in a vault folder. The SQLite cache stays local in plugin data.
ast.target: 对话和工作区事件数据存储在保险库文件夹中。SQLite 缓存则保留在插件数据本地。
